title: shorea maxima
intro: Shorea maxima, also known as the Bintangor or Yellow Meranti, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to Borneo. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and triterpenoids. The health benefits of Shorea maxima include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Shorea maxima, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used as a timber tree due to its durable wood.
